completed_tasks.name: Rollback Tessy module execution and resync gitlink
Fix post-commit hook installer and local shim
Archive the rollback record and update canonical docs

blockers.description: Root-only rollback was insufficient because the phase execution lived in the Tessy module.
blockers.workaround: Inspect the module repo directly before reverting or syncing the superproject gitlink.

blockers.description: The installed post-commit shim escaped the tracked hook arguments literally as "$@".

decisions.rationale: Keeps the failure history and recovery path explicit for future resumes.

decisions.decision: Treat the root as orchestration and the modules as first-class repos
decisions.rationale: Prevents repeating root-only rollback mistakes and keeps the sync model honest.

decisions.decision: Fix the tracked hook and the installed shim together
decisions.rationale: Avoids stale .git/hooks/post-commit behavior after hook changes.

next_action: Run /gsd-resume-work, then review root and module status before continuing with any further sync or cleanup.
context_notes: Phase 4.1 was executed in the Tessy module, then fully rolled back and archived. The live workspace now contains root canonical docs plus module-local WIP snapshots that still need to be committed and reconciled.
